# Inference Ops Packet Template

Use this template when the desk must hand work to another desk or implementation agent.

```yaml
workflow_mode:
current_stage: inference-ops-desk
capability_id:
user_goal:
acceptance_criteria:
risk_tier:
approval_state:
source_facts:
assumptions:
open_questions:
deployment_target:
traffic_profile:
latency_target:
availability_target:
slo_targets:
provider_limits:
rate_limits:
quota_policy:
retry_policy:
timeout_policy:
batching_policy:
caching_policy:
streaming_policy:
fallback_policy:
secrets_policy:
logging_policy:
retention_policy:
privacy_constraints:
rollback_policy:
runbook_requirements:
validation_gates:
hard_halts:
soft_gaps:
ready_to_continue:
downstream_handoff_targets:
```
